name: outlook
description: Read, send, and manage Outlook emails

envVars.name: MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Microsoft Azure App Client ID (Application ID)

tools.name: List Emails
tools.description: List recent emails from inbox or a specific folder

tools.name: Get Email
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific email

tools.name: Search Emails
tools.description: Search emails by query, subject, sender, or date

tools.name: List Folders
tools.description: List all mail folders in the mailbox

prompts.title: Check my emails
prompts.prompt: List my recent unread emails and summarize the most important ones.

prompts.title: Search my emails
prompts.prompt: Search my emails for specific topics, senders, or date ranges.

prompts.title: Draft an email
prompts.prompt: Help me draft a professional email with proper formatting and tone.
